description.ko: AQUA-5와 함께 해저 가장 깊은 곳으로 여행을 떠나보세요. 심해의 거대한 압력을 견디도록 설계된 이 기술은 비할 데 없는 선명함으로 고요하고 빛나는 심해의 아름다움을 밝혀줍니다.
description.en: Journey to the furthest reaches of the ocean floor with AQUA-5. Designed to withstand the crushing pressures of the abyss, this technology brings the silent, glowing beauty of the deep sea to light with unparalleled clarity.

prompt: A cinematic, wide-angle shot of the AQUA-5 advanced research module navigating the dark Hadal zone of the deep ocean. The vessel features a sleek, pressure-resistant metallic obsidian hull with glowing neon cyan accents. Bioluminescent deep-sea jellyfish and glowing coral reefs illuminate the pitch-black surroundings. Volumetric lighting, floating underwater particles, ultra-detailed textures, 8k resolution, photorealistic.
